mapper.sql: ord.id, ord.order_no, ord.user_id, ord.total_amount, ord.pay_amount, ord.freight, ord.status, ord.payment_method, ord.payment_time, ord.ship_time, ord.complete_time, ord.receiver_name, ord.receiver_phone, ord.receiver_address, ord.remark, ord.created_at, ord.updated_at

ord.id, ord.order_no, ord.user_id, ord.total_amount, ord.pay_amount, ord.freight, ord.status, ord.payment_method, ord.payment_time, ord.ship_time, ord.complete_time, ord.receiver_name, ord.receiver_phone, ord.receiver_address, ord.remark, ord.created_at, ord.updated_at, pay.payment_no
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mall_order ord LEFT JOIN mall_payment pay ON ord.order_no = pay.order_no AND pay.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' WHERE ord.order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT FROM mall_order ord LEFT JOIN mall_payment pay ON ord.order_no = pay.order_no AND pay.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' WHERE ord.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ord.created_at DESC

SELECT FROM mall_order ord LEFT JOIN mall_payment pay ON ord.order_no = pay.order_no AND pay.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' WHERE ord.user_id = #{userId} AND ord.status = #{status} ORDER BY ord.created_at DESC
SELECT FROM mall_order ord LEFT JOIN mall_payment pay ON ord.order_no = pay.order_no AND pay.payment_status = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY ${sortColumn} ${sortDir}
mapper.update: UPDATE mall_order SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE mall_order SET payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE mall_order SET payment_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE mall_order SET ship_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE mall_order SET complete_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mall_order ord WHERE ord.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) FROM mall_order WHERE status != 'CANCELLED'
